title: Alcohol and tobacco in pregnancy
excerpt: No safe alcohol level is established; smoking and vaping harm fetal growth. Support resources and postpartum planning.
content:
## Alcohol

There is **no known safe amount** of alcohol in pregnancy. Avoid entirely to prevent fetal alcohol spectrum disorders.

## Tobacco and vaping

Smoking increases risks of miscarriage, preterm birth, low birth weight, and SIDS. Vaping is not proven safe — quit if possible before or as early as possible in pregnancy.

## Support

- Counseling, nicotine replacement only under medical supervision.
- Partners should avoid smoking around the pregnant person.

## After birth

Continue smoke-free home for baby; alcohol passes into breast milk — plan accordingly.

metaDescription: Risks of alcohol, cigarettes, and vaping in pregnancy and where to get help quitting.
